data.title: Galveston Police Department Adopts Non-Lethal Response Solutions with Purchase of BolaWrap® Devices and WrapTactics™ Subscription, Supported by In-Person Training as Part of Broader NLR Strategy
data.description: The Galveston Police Department recently introduced a non-lethal approach to handling situations with the acquisition of BolaWrap® devices and a WrapTactics™ subscription. This initiative is in line with their broader non-lethal response strategy. The department purchased a specific number of BolaWrap® devices to equip officers with an alternative to lethal force when addressing various incidents. Additionally, the WrapTactics™ subscription was obtained to provide officers with training and support for effectively utilizing these tools. This move indicates a shift towards employing more humane and less deadly methods in law enforcement situations.

data.title: XRP leads with $224M weekly gains in crypto investments. Crypto ETPs draw $224M in inflows, Ether faces outflows. US ETFs fall behind.
data.description: Last week, investments in Crypto ETPs saw an influx of $224 million, with XRP leading the way in gains. However, there were outflows in Ether as US ETFs fell behind. This occurred amidst varied macroeconomic data and uncertainty regarding policies.

data.title: TuHURA Biosciences Appoints Amanda Garofalo, MSHS, as Senior Vice President of Clinical Operations
data.description: Bringing with her more than two decades of expertise in Phase I-IV drug and biologic development, Mrs. Garofalo joins TuHURA Biosciences, Inc. Based in Tampa, Florida, this company listed under NASDAQ as HURA is focused on Phase 3 immuno-oncology. They are actively working on pioneering therapeutics to combat cancer and have made significant progress in this field.

data.title: PartnerOne Announces Chief Executive Officer to Lead Mortgage Cadence
data.description: In Riverside, California on April 7, 2026, PartnerOne, a rapidly expanding software company, announced the appointment of Michael Detwiler as the new Chief Executive Officer of Mortgage Cadence. PartnerOne acquired Mortgage Cadence, a top cloud-based provider, recently in a strategic move.

data.title: Equifax Market Pulse Index Remains Steady But Highlights Growing Financial Divergence Among Consumers
data.description: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) has recently unveiled its fourth quarter 2025 Market Pulse Index, maintaining stability at 61.6. This index signifies a period of equilibrium in the overall U.S. financial landscape. The report highlights three distinct groups of financial risk within the market. This data offers valuable insights into the current economic climate by revealing key trends and potential areas of concern. Stay updated on emerging financial patterns with Equifax's detailed analysis.

data.title: Carolinas AGC General Contractor Members Honored Nationally
data.description: On April 7, 2026 in Charlotte, North Carolina, several members of Carolinas AGC (CAGC) were recognized for their outstanding achievements. They were awarded prestigious national honors, including the 2026 AGC Construction Safety Excellence Awards (CSEA) and the 2026 AGC Baldwin Group Build America Awards, during the 2026 AGC of America Convention held in Orlando, Florida. The event celebrated the exceptional contributions of these individuals to the construction industry, highlighting their commitment to excellence and innovation.

data.title: Argentine banks are trying out JPM Coin to accelerate settlements, despite central bank limits on crypto services.
data.description: Lenders in Argentina are said to be trying out JPMorgan's digital currency, JPM Coin, aiming to boost settlement speed and effectiveness. This initiative comes in the midst of the central bank's ongoing limitations on cryptocurrency services.

data.title: LeToya Luckett & Dr. Chi host "Orange Table Talk" an Honest Conversation on Infertility & Motherhood
data.description: In Houston on April 7, 2026, a transformative discussion took place blending authenticity and specialized knowledge to aid women tackling infertility and reproductive well-being. The event occurred in preparation for National Infertility Awareness Week between April 19 and 25. It featured a renowned figure, a recipient of multiple GRAMMY Awards and accomplished actress, who shared insights and experiences to empower women facing these challenges.

data.title: $20M in Bitcoin moved to Binance by whale during market sell-off, risking $15M loss.
data.description: On Tuesday, a large holder of Bitcoin moved 300 BTC valued at over $20 million to the exchange platform Binance. This transfer could potentially result in a loss of $15 million for the whale.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Hit $471 Million As Trump's Iran Deadline Nears Expiry
data.description: On April 6th, Bitcoin ETF inflows recorded a significant increase, reaching $471 million, marking the strongest daily intake in over a month and ranking as the sixth-largest of 2026. This surge falls short of the peak flow levels seen in January, with several trading days exceeding $700 million. The influx of funds coincides with Bitcoin's struggle to surpass $70,000 due to subdued spot demand and selling pressure from major holders. However, ETFs are now acting as the primary source of marginal buying, offsetting some of these challenges.Recent developments surrounding Iran have escalated tensions, with the country presenting a 10-point response to the U.S. peace plan. Iran's key demands include assurances against future attacks, a permanent end to the war, the removal of all U.S. sanctions, and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz in return for a $2 million fee per ship shared with Oman. The White House maintains a firm stance with a "no extension" policy, adding to the geopolitical uncertainties. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: IQST - IQSTEL Announces Strategic Digital Health Partnership and Investor Conference Call to Discuss Q4 & FY 2025 Results
data.description: A global telecommunications and technology company, IQSTEL Inc. (NASDAQ: IQST), is poised to venture into the lucrative digital health market valued at billions of dollars. The company recently revealed the signing of a Non-Binding Commercial Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), marking its strategic move into this rapidly expanding industry. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, in New York, underscoring IQSTEL's intention to capitalize on the booming opportunities in digital health.

data.title: Allucent Expands Strategic Leadership to Advance Centers of Expertise and Fortify Specialty CRO Position
data.description: Allucent, a global specialty Contract Research Organization (CRO) tailored for small and mid-sized biopharmaceutical companies, revealed a fresh therapeutic strategy on April 7, 2026. The strategy involves appointing new leaders in various crucial therapeutic areas to enhance the company’s focus on specialties. This move aims to fortify their integrated drug development approach. The organization, based in CARY, N.C., has not specified the exact number of new leaders or therapeutic areas being emphasized.
